svg.title: Poneglyph AI architecture
svg.desc: The six-agent system on Claude Opus 4.7. Two flows: the canonical pipeline (Scout and Scribe ingest, Archivist remembers, Drafter writes, Auditor verifies) and the on-demand briefing path triggered by the user.
svg.text: Triggered when new documents are ingested
Triggered by the user before a stakeholder meeting

g.text: Pipeline sequencing · SSE streaming · evidence routing · variance gates
